title: fragaria vesca var. collina
intro: Fragaria vesca var. collina, also known as the alpine strawberry or wild strawberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca var. collina include its ability to support the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
